topic.ja: ぷりんとの　じゅんび

ja.intro: がっこうで　せんせいと　がくせいが　はなしています。がくせいは　なんまい　こぴーしますか。

dialogue.speaker: せんせい
dialogue.text: たなかさん、この　ぷりんとを　こぴーしてください。

dialogue.speaker: がくせい
dialogue.text: はい、なんまいですか。

dialogue.speaker: せんせい
dialogue.text: がくせいは　にじゅうごにんですが　ひとりに　いちまいずつです。

dialogue.speaker: がくせい
dialogue.text: にじゅうごまいですね。

dialogue.speaker: せんせい
dialogue.text: あ、せんせいも　ごにんいますから　せんせいのぶんも　おねがいします。

dialogue.speaker: がくせい
dialogue.text: わかりました。

ja.question: がくせいは　なんまい　こぴーしますか。

tr.intro: Okulda öğretmen ve öğrenci konuşuyor. Öğrenci kaç tane kopya çekecek?

dialogue.speaker: Öğretmen
dialogue.text: Tanaka-san, lütfen bu el ilanını fotokopi çek.

dialogue.speaker: Öğrenci
dialogue.text: Evet, kaç tane?

dialogue.speaker: Öğretmen
dialogue.text: Öğrenci sayısı yirmi beş kişi ama herkese birer tane.

dialogue.speaker: Öğrenci
dialogue.text: Yirmi beş tane, değil mi?

dialogue.speaker: Öğretmen
dialogue.text: Ah, beş de öğretmen var, bu yüzden öğretmenlerin payını da rica ediyorum.

dialogue.speaker: Öğrenci
dialogue.text: Anladım.

tr.question: Öğrenci kaç tane kopya çekecek?

en.intro: At school, a teacher and a student are talking. How many copies will the student make?

dialogue.speaker: Teacher
dialogue.text: Tanaka-san, please make copies of this handout.

dialogue.speaker: Student
dialogue.text: Yes, how many copies?

dialogue.speaker: Teacher
dialogue.text: There are twenty-five students, and it's one copy for each person.

dialogue.speaker: Student
dialogue.text: So, twenty-five copies, right?

dialogue.speaker: Teacher
dialogue.text: Oh, there are also five teachers, so please make copies for the teachers too.

dialogue.speaker: Student
dialogue.text: Understood.

en.question: How many copies will the student make?

de.intro: In der Schule sprechen ein Lehrer und ein Schüler. Wie viele Kopien wird der Schüler machen?

dialogue.speaker: Lehrer/in
dialogue.text: Tanaka-san, bitte kopieren Sie dieses Handout.

dialogue.speaker: Schüler/in
dialogue.text: Ja, wie viele?

dialogue.speaker: Lehrer/in
dialogue.text: Es sind fünfundzwanzig Schüler, und es ist jeweils ein Exemplar pro Person.

dialogue.speaker: Schüler/in
dialogue.text: Also fünfundzwanzig Exemplare, richtig?

dialogue.speaker: Lehrer/in
dialogue.text: Ach, es gibt auch fünf Lehrer, also machen Sie bitte auch Kopien für die Lehrer.

dialogue.speaker: Schüler/in
dialogue.text: Verstanden.

de.question: Wie viele Kopien wird der Schüler machen?

fr.intro: À l'école, un professeur et un élève parlent. Combien de copies l'élève va-t-il faire ?

dialogue.speaker: Professeur
dialogue.text: Tanaka-san, veuillez copier ce polycopié.

dialogue.speaker: Étudiant/e
dialogue.text: Oui, combien ?

dialogue.speaker: Professeur
dialogue.text: Il y a vingt-cinq élèves, et c'est une copie pour chacun.

dialogue.speaker: Étudiant/e
dialogue.text: Donc, vingt-cinq copies, n'est-ce pas ?

dialogue.speaker: Professeur
dialogue.text: Ah, il y a aussi cinq professeurs, alors s'il vous plaît, faites aussi des copies pour les professeurs.

dialogue.speaker: Étudiant/e
dialogue.text: Compris.

fr.question: Combien de copies l'élève va-t-il faire ?

es.intro: En la escuela, un profesor y un estudiante están hablando. ¿Cuántas copias hará el estudiante?

dialogue.speaker: Profesor/a
dialogue.text: Tanaka-san, por favor, haz copias de este folleto.

dialogue.speaker: Estudiante
dialogue.text: Sí, ¿cuántas?

dialogue.speaker: Profesor/a
dialogue.text: Hay veinticinco estudiantes, y es una copia para cada persona.

dialogue.speaker: Estudiante
dialogue.text: Veinticinco copias, ¿verdad?

dialogue.speaker: Profesor/a
dialogue.text: Ah, también hay cinco profesores, así que por favor, haz copias también para los profesores.

dialogue.speaker: Estudiante
dialogue.text: Entendido.

es.question: ¿Cuántas copias hará el estudiante?

ko.intro: 학교에서 선생님과 학생이 이야기하고 있습니다. 학생은 몇 장 복사할까요?

dialogue.speaker: 선생님
dialogue.text: 타나카 씨, 이 유인물을 복사해 주세요.

dialogue.speaker: 학생
dialogue.text: 네, 몇 장인가요?

dialogue.speaker: 선생님
dialogue.text: 학생은 스물다섯 명이지만, 한 명당 한 장씩입니다.

dialogue.speaker: 학생
dialogue.text: 스물다섯 장이네요.

dialogue.speaker: 선생님
dialogue.text: 아, 선생님도 다섯 분 계시니까 선생님들 몫도 부탁합니다.

dialogue.speaker: 학생
dialogue.text: 알겠습니다.

ko.question: 학생은 몇 장 복사할까요?

logic.tr: 25 öğrenci + 5 öğretmen = 30 kişi. Her birine 1 kopya = 30 kopya. 25 (sadece öğrenci) yanlış hesaptır. Doğru cevap さんじゅうまい (30 adet).
logic.en: 25 students + 5 teachers = 30 people. 1 copy each = 30 copies. 25 (students only) is a partial calculation. Correct: さんじゅうまい (30).
logic.de: 25 Schüler + 5 Lehrer = 30 Personen. 1 Kopie pro Person = 30 Kopien. 25 (nur Schüler) ist eine unvollständige Berechnung. Richtig: さんじゅうまい (30).
logic.fr: 25 élèves + 5 professeurs = 30 personnes. 1 copie chacun = 30 copies. 25 (élèves seulement) est un calcul partiel. Correct : さんじゅうまい (30).
logic.es: 25 estudiantes + 5 profesores = 30 personas. 1 copia para cada uno = 30 copias. 25 (solo estudiantes) es un cálculo parcial. Correcto: さんじゅうまい (30).
logic.ko: 학생 25명 + 선생님 5명 = 30명. 한 명당 1장씩 = 30장. 25장(학생만)은 잘못된 계산입니다. 정답: さんじゅうまい (30장).
